relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Life is asked to discern authority under the Divine.
Resistance to rightful order has consequence.
Authority is meant to praise good and restrain harm.
Power is accountable as servant toward the good, not owner of the soul.
Conscience, not fear alone, shapes civic conduct.
Taxes belong to the ordered public function.
Give what is owed without making rulers divine.
The only endless debt is love.
Love does not harm the neighbor; love fulfills Law.
Night passes; light is to be put on like armor.
Walk as daylight, not as scattered desire and rivalry.
Put on Messiah and do not provision flesh-pattern desire.

contemplative_note: Romans 13 must be read under love and light, not empire-worship. Its spiritual center is neighbor-love fulfilling Law and waking from sleep.
